stakeholders.name: Prakash Gupta
stakeholders.approach: Email hoc.seattle@mea.gov.in requesting cultural affairs meeting; reference India Culture Week 2024 as the framing
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Most active consulate on the West Coast for cultural programming. India Culture Week 2024 precedent. 8-state Pacific Northwest jurisdiction.

stakeholders.name: Dr. K. Srikar Reddy
stakeholders.organization: Consulate General of India, San Francisco
stakeholders.approach: Through CG office, request cultural affairs meeting; reference Vivekananda tribute concert as aspirational model
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Established consulate with deep institutional relationships; proven ability to activate top-tier Indian classical artists and major venues; 12-state jurisdiction

stakeholders.name: Dr. K.J. Srinivasa
stakeholders.organization: Consulate General of India, Los Angeles
stakeholders.approach: Year 1 introduction email only; formal partnership ask in Year 2
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Year 2 expansion partner; new consulate hungry for marquee cultural engagements

stakeholders.name: Sital Kalantry
stakeholders.approach: Introduction via LinkedIn or mutual contact; propose festival collaboration with explicit reference to India Culture Week 2024 success
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Co-presenter of Seattle University's India Culture Week 2024; proven CGI Seattle partner; built the intermediary institutional role we would need

stakeholders.name: Anjali Sharan
stakeholders.approach: Warm intro for Year 2 planning; Year 1 light-touch email
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Spoke at CGI LA's downtown launch event; key cultural diplomacy voice in LA

stakeholders.name: ICCR Cultural Delegations Desk
stakeholders.approach: Work via CGI Seattle/SF, not directly
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Travel grants, empanelled artists, monuments, cultural chairs — all flow through ICCR

stakeholders.name: Embassy of India DC - Cultural Section
stakeholders.approach: Loop in after Seattle + SF consulate meetings
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Federal-level liaison for bi-coastal programs

stakeholders.name: Fractured Atlas Program Team
stakeholders.approach: Submit fiscal sponsorship application ASAP; start with Professional membership ($10/month)
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Fastest path to 501(c)(3) legal structure

stakeholders.name: Anjani Saraf
stakeholders.approach: Direct outreach by you (not us). Request letter of support once concept note is ready.
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Named relationship in India; potential for letter of support or introduction to government offices in India

stakeholders.name: Seattle University Office of Global Engagement
stakeholders.approach: Warm intro via CGI Seattle; reference prior partnership
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Hosted India Culture Week 2024; proven venue partner likely willing to repeat and scale

stakeholders.name: UW South Asia Center
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Larger venue capacity than Seattle U; CG Gupta has met with President Cauce

stakeholders.name: Stanford Center for South Asia
stakeholders.approach: Cold intro with CGI SF referral
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Major South Asia academic center in Bay Area

stakeholders.name: UC Berkeley Institute for South Asia Studies
stakeholders.approach: Cold intro; emphasize classical music legacy
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Ali Akbar College of Music links; established South Asia academic infrastructure

stakeholders.name: Ragamala
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: National Indian classical music nonprofit; potential institutional co-presenter

stakeholders.name: The Music Circle
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Founded 1973 by Ravi Shankar; multiple ACTA Living Cultures grants; potential Year 2 LA co-presenter

stakeholders.name: Chitresh Das Dance Company
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Kathak legacy institution; artist/institutional partner

stakeholders.name: Abhinaya Dance Company
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Major Bharatanatyam institution; potential co-presenter

stakeholders.name: Ali Akbar College of Music
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Oldest Hindustani classical music institution in North America (since 1967); potential artist source and faculty for expert letters

stakeholders.name: Center for the Performing Arts, San Jose
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Used by CGI SF for July 2025 Vivekananda tribute; proven Indian classical venue

stakeholders.name: Zellerbach Hall
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Major West Coast performing arts venue

stakeholders.name: Seattle Center / Festal
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Multiple venues (The Armory, McCaw Hall); Festal program is established Indian programming home (Diwali)

stakeholders.name: SFJAZZ Center
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Known for global traditional music programming

stakeholders.name: Northwest Share
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Produces Diwali: Lights of India; established Indian arts festival operator with City of Seattle and 4Culture relationships

stakeholders.name: India Association of Western Washington
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Seattle-area diaspora hub for community engagement

stakeholders.name: FIA Bay Area Chapter
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: Diaspora organizing in the Bay Area

stakeholders.name: Kidambi & Associates, P.C.
stakeholders.whyTheyMatter: 20+ years of P-3 visa work for Indian classical artists, including Cleveland Thyagaraja Aradhana Festival
